command.text: if @@action = 'Edit' begin declare @ma_bp varchar(32), @ma_nt varchar(3), @ngay_bd datetime, @bp_me varchar(32), @luong_tt decimal(16, 4) select @ngay_bd = ngay_bd, @ma_nt = ma_nt from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0 select @bp_me = bo_phan from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec while isnull(@bp_me, '') <> '' begin select @ma_bp = @bp_me, @bp_me = bp_me from hrbp where ma_bp = @bp_me select @luong_tt = luong_tt from hrdmlttv where ma_bp = @ma_bp and ma_nt = @ma_nt and ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) from hrdmlttv where ma_bp = @ma_bp and ma_nt = @ma_nt and ngay_hl <= @ngay_bd) if isnull(@luong_tt, 0) <> 0 break end select isnull(@luong_tt, 0) as luong_tt return end
declare @$exists nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Ngày bắt đầu đã có hoặc không hợp lệ.' else N'The start date is invalid or already exists.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where (stt_rec = @stt_rec and ngay_bd = @ngay_bd)) begin select 'ngay_bd' as field, @$exists as message return end
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec) select @stt_rec0 = max(stt_rec0), @line_nbr = max(line_nbr) from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec else select @stt_rec0 = '000', @line_nbr = 0
exec dbo.FastBusiness$HRM$GetRowID @stt_rec0 output, @line_nbr output select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID
if exists(select 1 from @@table where stt_rec = @stt_rec and (ngay_bd = @ngay_bd) and (stt_rec0 <> @stt_rec0)) begin select 'ngay_bd' as field, @$exists as message return end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where stt_rec = @stt_rec and stt_rec0 = @stt_rec0

action.text: declare @ma_bp varchar(32), @bp_me varchar(32), @luong_tt decimal(16, 4) select @bp_me = bo_phan from hrnv where stt_rec = @stt_rec while isnull(@bp_me, '') <> '' begin select @ma_bp = @bp_me, @bp_me = bp_me from hrbp where ma_bp = @bp_me select @luong_tt = luong_tt from hrdmlttv where ma_bp = @ma_bp and ma_nt = @ma_nt and ngay_hl = (select max(ngay_hl) from hrdmlttv where ma_bp = @ma_bp and ma_nt = @ma_nt and ngay_hl <= @ngay_bd) if isnull(@luong_tt, 0) <> 0 break end select isnull(@luong_tt, 0) as value return
